---
title: "Lab: Black Politicians"
---

## Objective

Build the first non-`lalonde` worked example using `causaldata::black_politicians`.

## Design Setup

- Target estimand: `ATT`
- Candidate treatment: binary indicator from dataset (to be finalized)
- Candidate outcome: policy-relevant binary/continuous outcome (to be finalized)
- Adjustment covariates: pre-treatment demographics and political context (to be finalized)

## Planned Analysis Blocks

1. Data dictionary and variable role mapping.
2. Pre-adjustment diagnostics with `MatchIt` (`method = NULL`).
3. Exact matching feasibility check.
4. Tuned CEM design and retention tradeoff.
5. Entropy balancing with ESS and weight-dispersion checks.
6. Post-design effect estimation and synthesis table.

## Implementation Checklist

- [ ] Lock treatment, outcome, and covariate specification.
- [ ] Add reproducible data-loading chunk.
- [ ] Add diagnostics figures and balance tables.
- [ ] Add method comparison summary.
